query: SELECT o.id, o.name, o.primaryAdminId, o.onboardingStatus, o.onboardingLinkSentTo, u.email, u.name as admin_name, u.role FROM organizations o LEFT JOIN users u ON o.primaryAdminId = u.id ORDER BY o.id LIMIT 15;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3DLEw35gkkimUcv.eeb1f1cd43d3 --database 6e38zfddYazj4vVoRnY5Mj --execute SELECT o.id, o.name, o.primaryAdminId, o.onboardingStatus, o.onboardingLinkSentTo, u.email, u.name as admin_name, u.role FROM organizations o LEFT JOIN users u ON o.primaryAdminId = u.id ORDER BY o.id LIMIT 15;
